focus_points.label: Travel impact on energy and wellbeing.
focus_points.reason: Notes mention Brian has been traveling a lot and seems tired. Could be affecting his energy levels or motivation — worth clarifying how he's managing it.

focus_points.label: Current priorities amid frequent travel.
focus_points.reason: Whether they're still on the work that made them senior, or quietly being absorbed into firefighting.

focus_points.label: What he'd want more of from you right now.
focus_points.reason: Bi-weekly check-in default — the cleanest channel for him to redirect the relationship if something is off due to travel fatigue.
